Weekly Ship Recycling Report
18 November 2023 - 24 November 2023
Visit : www.best-oasis.com Head Office: 3201, Saba Tower 1, Cluster E, Jumeirah Lake Towers, Dubai, U.A.E
Email: bol@bol.ae Contact: +971 4575 4667

[Page 2]
Highlights of the Week
The ship recycling activity for this week has continued to exhibit a sluggish pace, mirroring the trends observed in the preceding week. In the Indian market,
there has been a consistent reflection of the previous week's trends, with prices remaining constant. However, it is worth noting that recyclers are currently
presenting favorable offers.
